text:
maho        2008-09-08 06:00:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add port math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl
  
  This is spline-gcvspl.
  
  B-spline data smoothing using generalized cross-validation
  and mean squared prediction or explicit user smoothing
  
  The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
  which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
  extensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
  build and install scripts.
  
  PR:             127030
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen@math.missouri.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.535     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-spline-gcvspl/pkg-plist (new)
